clock_basis: CDC confirmed/suspected counts carry a May 24 data/report date; DRC MoH deaths carry a May 24 publication clock with no dateRapportage, so deaths are a headline input but not an ordinary dated death-trajectory node.
held_out_reason: Deaths headline aggregate remains in count reconciliation, but the publication-only endpoint is separated from dated death-line nodes.

clock_basis: Snapshot-level visibility nowcast; prior-weighted with a Beta-Binomial update from the current confirmed/suspected headline pair.
Confirmed endpoint is dated May 24; the completeness posterior is the current snapshot posterior applied across the displayed confirmed-case series.

The 223-death input comes from the US CDC Current Situation 25 May, a dated-report source, so it updates the snapshot-level sensitivity calculation as a connected dated trajectory point. The DRC MoH dashboard aggregate (179, 24 May) and the ECDC 25 May figure (119) are held as conflict anchors and are not promoted, so no publication-clock-only endpoint is rendered.
held_out_reason: Publication-clock count updates the snapshot-level model input but is not plotted as an ordinary connected dated trajectory node.

clock_basis: Transmission plausibility uses the current reconciled confirmed headline count.
